g.title: transition_download
g.text: Transition download: HTTP GET/stream to temp; detect MIME; set statusCode

g.title: transition_local_ocr
g.text: Transition local_ocr: Run local OCR confidence pass and queue follow-up AI tasks

g.title: transition_iiif
g.text: Transition iiif: So download is optional

g.title: transition_queue_ai
g.text: Transition queue_ai: Populate aiQueue and enter the AI task pipeline

g.title: transition_download_failed
g.text: Transition download_failed: Non-200 or I/O error; may be retried with backoff

g.title: transition_invalid_file
g.text: Transition invalid_file: Unsupported media type or invalid attributes

g.title: transition_triage
g.text: Transition triage: Call ai-tools /v1/responses model=auto; persist Observation[] (caption, ocr_text, keywords).

g.title: transition_analyze
g.text: Transition analyze: Compute blurhash/thumbhash, color palette, pHash, media probe

g.title: place_triaged
g.text: Triage observations recorded (caption, ocr_text, keywords from ai-tools /v1/responses)

g.title: transition_finalize
g.text: Transition finalize: Finalize asset (indexing handled by listeners)

g.title: place_ai_ready
g.text: AI task pipeline active — aiQueue has pending tasks

g.title: transition_ai_task
g.text: Transition ai_task: Execute the next task in aiQueue and record the result in aiCompleted

g.title: transition_ai_done
g.text: Transition ai_done: All aiQueue tasks done; return to complete
